title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第12部分）
content:
enance of intended to support. Research Equipment The period of maintenance funded from the research grant should be restricted to the duration of the project.

For new equipment, maintenance should not be budgeted for any period for which the equipment is under warranty (e. g. Year 1) and quotations for maintenance contract must be included. Staff Retreat Not allowable Stationery & Allowable Printer Consumables If they are meant solely for TL projects usage. Allowable Transportation, Allowable Postage & Courier Services Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 9 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses These include postage, courier and freight charges for bringing in equipment and / or specialised consumables meant for research purposes. Reimbursement of local transport for the purpose of carrying out their research works. Transport claims to be supported by meeting confirmation emails, if any and purpose of the trips. Local transport claim includes the admin charges which forms part of the transport costs. Volunteers and Allowable Research Patients For research involving human subjects, tissues, and / or personal data, PIs must seek approval from the University’s Institutional Review Board (IRB) before commencement of the research works. Payments to volunteers and research subjects should be relevant to the scope and studies of the research supported by the TL Research Grant. Please refer to the University’s policy on the use of human subjects, tissues, and / or personal data in SUTD Central under Office of Research Purchase of Equipment IT Equipment Allowable PIs to justify the need for a new computer equipment and it should only be used for the purpose of research and deemed essential to the project. Provide to the IT Assistant Director from Office of Information Technology (IT) with the quotation(s) obtained, get clearance and approval on the procurement before confirming the purchase. Approval from the Lead PI (if applicable) or TL Director is required too. All IT equipment will be considered as fixed asset (or Low Value Asset, depending on the cost of the item) under the University’s Fixed Assets (FA) Policy, an asset number will be assigned to the equipment and it should be affixed with the asset tag given by Office of Finance. Refer to the policy in SUTD Central under Office of Finance. Please refer to the University’s IT policy in SUTD Central under Office of Information Technology (IT). Purchase of Allowable PDAs, Mobile Phones, etc Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 10 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses PIs to justify the need for a new computer equipment and it should only be used for the purpose of research and deemed essential to the project. Approval from the Lead PI (if applicable) or TL Director is required. All PDAs, tablets and mobile phones will be considered as fixed asset (or Low Value Asset, depending on the cost of the item) under the University’s Fixed Assets (FA) Policy, an asset number will be assigned to the equipment and it should be affixed with the asset tag given by Office of Finance. Refer to the policy in SUTD Central under Office of Finance.
